title: norta altissima
intro: Norta altissima, a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the borage family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of norta altissima include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Norta altissima can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
